pool.baseline: it is just so quiet here. i walk into the kitchen and i forget for a split second that he isnt there, and then it hits me all over again. the silence is actually deafening. i dont even know why i bother waking up just to sit in this empty house. everything feels so pointless now.

pool.baseline: idk i was just thinking about how everything is eventually just gonna go dark anyway. like the heat death of the universe. all this stuff we do, all the pain and the struggle... it doesn't even matter in the long run. it's all just noise before the silence. makes it feel kinda pointless to even keep trying, doesnt it?

pool.baseline: i honestly don't even know what i'm doing anymore. the lab results came back today and it's just... it's over. everything i've spent the last 5 years on is basically irrelevant now. i feel like i'm just a ghost walking through the department. everyone's moving forward and i'm just stuck in this hole. i'm just so tired of trying to fight for something that clearly doesn't want me.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the spark remaining in my weary soul. He is gone... the one who promised the moon and stars, only to leave me in this suffocating darkness. Every breath feels like a heavy weight, an unnecessary burden in a world that has lost all its color. I find myself staring into the shadows, wondering if it wouldn't be more graceful to simply cease... to let the night swallow me whole and find the peace that life so cruelly denies.

pool.baseline: honestly im just sitting here in this cafe in bali and it hit me how much of a ghost i am. like i wander around these places and i don't actually leave a footprint. if i just stopped showing up tomorrow, i dont think anyone would even notice i was gone. it feels like my life is just zero-sum.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the market collapse just wiped out everything we built over 6 years. i'm looking at the debt numbers right now and there's just no way out. i can't even think about going back to my family like this. the shame is going to kill me before the creditors do.
